title: Production hardening — deploy, tracing, rate limiting
description:
Add production-readiness features that are currently missing or only TODOs.

Scope:
1. genai_tk.deploy module:
   - LangServe / FastAPI wrapper to serve agents as REST APIs
   - Health check endpoint
   - Simple: deploy(agent, port=8000)

2. Structured observability:
   - LangSmith tracing integration (already partially in utils/tracing.py)
   - OpenTelemetry span export option
   - Default: tracing off, enable via env var GENAI_TK_TRACING=langsmith|otel

3. Rate limiting (TODO already in llm_factory.py line 38):
   - Implement InMemoryRateLimiter from langchain_core
   - Configurable per-provider in YAML
   - Default: no rate limit

Acceptance criteria:
- deploy(agent) starts a FastAPI server with /invoke and /health endpoints
- GENAI_TK_TRACING=langsmith enables trace export
- Rate limiter respects per-provider config from YAML

title: One-liner MCP server exposure
description:
The existing mcp/server_builder.py is powerful but requires YAML config. Add a simple programmatic API for exposing tools/functions as MCP servers.

Goal:
  from genai_tk.mcp import expose
  expose('my-server', tools=[my_langchain_tool, my_func])

Scope:
- Add genai_tk/mcp/quick.py with expose() function
- Accept: list of LangChain BaseTool, plain Python functions, or mixed
- Auto-wrap plain functions via @tool decorator or FastMCP tool registration
- Default transport: stdio (for Claude Desktop / Cursor / Amp)
- Optional: transport='sse', port=8000
- Re-export from genai_tk.mcp.__init__
- Builds on existing server_builder.py and tool_adapter.py

Acceptance criteria:
- expose('test', tools=[lambda_tool]) starts an MCP server on stdio
- expose('test', tools=[plain_function]) auto-wraps the function
- Existing server_builder.py YAML flow still works unchanged

title: Dependency slimming — split pyproject.toml into core + extras
description:
The current pyproject.toml has 60+ core dependencies including spaCy models, Prefect, BAML, smolagents, etc. This blocks adoption in constrained environments (Docker, serverless).

Scope:
- Keep only essential deps in core: pydantic, omegaconf, loguru, typer, rich, langchain-core, langchain, langgraph, httpx, python-dotenv
- Move heavy deps to optional extras groups:
  - [nlp]: spacy, spacy models, tokenizers, abbreviations, unidecode
  - [rag]: chromadb, langchain-chroma, bm25s, chonkie, fuzzysearch
  - [search]: tavily-python, ddgs, gpt-researcher
  - [agents]: smolagents, deepagents, deepagents-cli, agent-sandbox
  - [docs]: markitdown, openpyxl, readabilipy
  - [graph]: kuzu, langchain-kuzu, baml-cli, baml-lib
  - [workflow]: prefect
  - [all]: everything
- Guard all imports with try/except or lazy imports in affected modules
- Update README install instructions
- Target: core install < 30 deps

Acceptance criteria:
- uv pip install genai-tk installs core only
- uv pip install 'genai-tk[all]' installs everything
- from genai_tk import Agent works with core-only install
- make test-unit passes with core-only

title: High-level Agent API — genai_tk.Agent convenience class
description:
Create a top-level Agent class that wraps the existing factory pattern into a production-friendly API.

Goal: Users should be able to go from zero to running agent in 3 lines:
  from genai_tk import Agent
  agent = Agent('Research', tools=['tavily', 'filesystem'])
  result = await agent.run('Summarize recent AI news')

Scope:
- New file: genai_tk/agent.py with Agent class
- Wraps agents/langchain/factory.py internally
- Sensible defaults: memory checkpointer, rich middleware, default LLM from config
- Accepts profile name OR inline config (llm=, tools=, system_prompt=)
- Sync .run() + async .arun() wrappers
- Re-export from genai_tk/__init__.py
- Unit tests in tests/unit_tests/test_agent.py

Acceptance criteria:
- from genai_tk import Agent works
- Agent('Research').run('hello') returns a response (integration)
- Agent(llm='gpt_41mini@openai', tools=[]).run('hello') works ad-hoc
- Existing factory/config code untouched

title: Clean up dead code and unify LLM API surface
description:
Multiple redundant APIs and dead code make the codebase harder to navigate.

Scope:
- Delete get_llm_unified() (exact duplicate of get_llm with fewer params)
- Remove deprecated llm_id and llm_tag params from get_llm()
- Clean up wip/ directory: graduate useful code or delete abandoned files
  - wip/autogen_utils.py — check if used, likely delete
  - wip/browser_use_langchain.py — check overlap with tools/smolagents/browser_use.py
  - wip/cognee_utils.py — likely delete
  - wip/config_loader.py — superseded by utils/config_mngr.py
  - wip/test_structured_output.py — move to tests/ or delete
  - wip/compat/ — evaluate
- Remove copilot_llm.py and test_copilot_llm.py from project root (looks like scratch files)
- Consolidate extra/graphs/, extra/rag/, extra/structured/ naming

Acceptance criteria:
- wip/ directory removed or reduced to actively-developed items
- Only one get_llm() function with clean signature
- make check passes
- No import breakage (grep for all removed symbols)
